text: COVID can't keep a good clown down. Just kidding, I am a COVID denier. It's me Puder Schmood from Atlanta, Georgia. Just kidding, never been. And I'm gonna pull a food card for you. Live from Nevada. Never been there either. The golf ball incident. Now it's a kid. My brother and my cousin were playing with golf balls and shooting them into the forest behind the house. And my cousin said, this one squishy. And he hit it. And it only got to the corner of the backyard. I of course, being a gay six-year-old immediately ran to the squishy golf ball to squish it. But then I accidentally just hurled myself over my backyard six foot drop into forny rose bushes. So that's the moment I stop believing in God. What's the message today? God is a lie, but you know it isn't pain. And pain is a part of the human experience. But you know it isn't Puder Schmood. The Puder Schmood experience lies elsewhere. I am rambling and I can't seem to stop talking. So I'm just gonna end the video. Kiss me on the mouth. Goodnight, I love you.
